svg.title: NevUp Track 1 — LLD Database Schema
svg.desc: Entity relationship diagram showing trades, sessions, debriefs, users, behavioral_metrics_hourly hypertable, overtrading_events, and emotion_win_rates tables with foreign key relationships.
svg.text: idx: trades(user_id, entry_at DESC) · trades(session_id) · trades(user_id, status, exit_at)
